metadata.name: Potable Water Resupply in Arid Environment

description: A logistics officer must plan the production and distribution of potable water for a battalion operating in the desert.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the daily water requirement for the entire battalion based on personnel count and environmental factors.

expected_outcome.value: Officer accurately calculates the total daily water need.

nodes.task_description: Check the status and production rate of all available Reverse Osmosis Water Purification Units (ROWPUs).

expected_outcome.value: Officer determines they have enough production capacity to meet demand.

nodes.task_description: Create a distribution schedule to deliver water from the ROWPUs to all company positions.

expected_outcome.value: Officer creates an efficient schedule to ensure all soldiers receive their daily water supply.
